title: All Planets Relief Fund
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Law |relatedevents= |proposedby=[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' |image= |name=All Planets Relief Fund |dateproposed= |government=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |legislativebody=[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] |result=Legislation adopted for Fund creation |side1= |side2= |otherkeyindividuals= }} {{Quote|This is Palpatine's pet project, and it's a good one. He's worked his way through the tangled bureaucracy to get it off the ground. Now any world in peril can petition the Senate directly for funds through one central account. Palpatine claims this will stop the bureaucratic slowdown for relief to troubled worlds.|Tyro Caladian, Senatorial aide|}} The '''All Planets Relief Fund''' was created in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]] by a law that reformed the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] system for assisting [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], and sought specifically to address the cry of planets ''imperiled, ''those in ''critical need'' of relief funding. The new legislation, the result of years of steadfast work on the part of many planetary governments, was skillfully drafted by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], on the capital world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Soon after the successful passage of the law to create the fund, Palpatine held an inaugural ceremony in Coruscant's [[Business district (Coruscant)|Business District]] to officially open the fund and transfer its collected treasury to a designated vault within the [[Bank of the Core/Legends|Bank of the Core]]. The notorious [[Slams|Slam gang]] attempted during this ceremony, however, to steal the relief fund treasury—an attempt foiled by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The heist, however, was actually masterminded by even greater criminal minds, as a diversion from a major operation to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Palpatine and [[Attack on the Senate Building|destroy]] the Galactic Senate and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in a single day. ==History== {{Quote|This fund has been the result of years of steady work on the part of many worlds. It is a tribute to the very ideals the Galactic Senate was founded upon originally—cooperation and benevolence.|Palpatine, to Jedi Knight Obi-Wan Kenobi and his Padawan, Anakin Skywalker|}} The All Planets Relief Fund was established by legislation that Palpatine, the Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic, authored and saw through to Senate-adoption, when the law passed in 24 BBY, to allow any imperiled world in desperate need of relief funding to directly petition the Galactic Senate for assistance. Under the new mandate, critical-relief funds would be transferred through one central account. Chancellor Palpatine claimed that the relief fund would help avoid the [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucratic]] slowdown experienced under the Republic's present system (which, notwithstanding, would enjoy continued use for ''non''-critical projects). Indeed, antecedent to Palpatine's relief measure, a world in peril, under the current system, had to first petition the Senate, then have their case reviewed by several committees—in a long, and often unsuccessful, approval process—before it could receive relief funding. Response to the bill that established the relief fund was generally positive, and [[senatorial aide]] [[Tyro Caladian]] commented enthusiastically on the new fund's merits. ===Inaugural ceremony=== {{Quote|I accept this treasury on behalf of the Senate, and thank all the generous worlds that contributed. This is the dawn of a new age. An age where help will arrive when and where it is most needed. Thank you all.|Supreme Chancellor Palpatine, in his inaugural ceremony remarks, accepts the All Planets Relief Fund treasury|}} Soon after funding the project, Palpatine presided over an inaugural ceremony in the [[Bank of the Core Plaza]] to officially open the new relief fund and celebrate the success of the law that created it. As the All Planets account was funded in [[Crystalline vertex/Legends|crystalline vertex]] by multiple Senate-member worlds, a vast crowd of beings had assembled at the plaza not only for the ceremony, but also for the grand spectacle of seeing such an awesome concentration of treasure in one place. The [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]], in an end-of-ceremony transfer of funds, escorted the [[Repulsorlift transport/Legends|repulsorlift wagon]] that enthroned the vertex treasury to a Core Bank vault. ===Heist attempt=== {{Quote|Another two minutes and we would have been out of here with the vertex."
"Everything depends on minutes, Val. We live and die on minutes.|Valadon and Roper Slam, leaders of the Slam gang, after being foiled by the Jedi in their attempted heist of the All Planets Relief Fund treasury|}} In the final moments of that high-security transfer, however, an attempt to steal the relief fund treasury was made by the leaders of the [[Slams]], a notorious gang, who were disguised as Senate Guards. The attempt was foiled by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ferus Olin]]. Shortly after frustrating the plot, Kenobi realized that the Slams' attempt to steal the treasury was merely a diversion from the ''real'' mission, one masterminded and led by galactic criminal [[Granta Omega]]: this son of [[Xanatos]], following admirably in his father's footsteps (and with the help of his partner in crime, mad scientist [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]), sought the utter destruction of Republic governance and, by association, the power of the Jedi Order, through the [[Assassin/Legends|mass-assassination]] of the Supreme Chancellor and thousands of Galactic Senators and their advisors by an army of [[Seeker (droid)/Legends|seeker droids]]. The [[Grand Convocation Chamber]] was the setting of the [[attack on the Senate Building]], which, though not without casualties, was ultimately foiled by the Jedi. ==Behind the scenes== The All Planets Relief Fund appeared in the young adult novel ''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'', the ninth volume in the [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest|''Jedi Quest'']] series written by [[Jude Watson]] and released in [[July]] [[2004]]. The All Planets Relief Fund was later mentioned in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[December]] [[2008]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Galactic Republic laws and acts]] [[Category:Separatist Crisis laws and acts]]
